verification.heading: Professional verification
verification.intro: To publish on the marketplace, we need to confirm your professional identity. Upload one of the following documents: trade register, national ID, or farmer's card.
verification.noKycRequired: No KYC verification is required for your role ({role}).

status.pending: Your document is being reviewed. You'll receive an email as soon as an administrator has validated it.
status.approved: Your profile is verified — you can now publish on the marketplace.
status.rejected: Your document was not accepted. You can submit a new one below.

errors.invalidFormat: Format not accepted. Use PDF, JPG, PNG or WebP.

success.title: Document submitted successfully
success.body: Your document is being reviewed. An administrator will review it within 24 to 48 hours. You'll receive an email as soon as a decision is made.

uploadForm.fileLabel: File (PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP — 5 MB max)
